summary: Excellent soundboard recording of a great 1979 show
review: The reviewer rates this as a five‑star performance, praising both the sound quality and the overall show. The GEMS soundboard source provides clear audio that captures the energy of the concert.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review, but it gives a full five‑star rating for both sound and performance, indicating an outstanding show with high‑quality recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes good sound; GEMS soundboard source typically offers clear, balanced audio.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer simply describes the show as a solid, enjoyable performance.
